name: Tukas Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Tukas Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells food products. The company offers tomato and pepper pastes, dried and grated tomatoes, sauces, pickles, jams, and olives; canned products, including vegetables, delicatessen, pulses, and ready meals; ketchups, mayonnaises, and hot pepper and breakfast sauces; and roasted, boiled, ready to serve food, and frozen products. It sells its products under the Tukas brand name. The company was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.
